project_type: Android Kotlin app (WebView-based Muslim Clock for TV/tablet/landscape)
build_system: Gradle 8.14 wrapper, AGP 8.5.2, Kotlin 1.9.24, compileSdk 34, minSdk 21, JDK 17 target
test_framework: No test suite present - validation via build success
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon and confirm it produces app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk without errors
setup_instructions: Java 25 and Gradle 8.14 available on host. JAVA_HOME may need to be set. Run: export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64 or similar if needed. The project compileOptions target JDK 17.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No Android device for runtime testing - build verification only. No test suite exists.
contribution_requirements: Each fix/feature = branch new = PR new. Keep all existing preference keys and functionality intact.
key_patterns: SettingsActivity hosts a SettingsFragment (PreferenceFragmentCompat) inside a FrameLayout container. Settings use res/xml/preferences.xml. Custom preferences: ColorPickerPreference (DialogPreference subclass with swatch grid), LocationSearchPreference (plain Preference that opens a DialogFragment). Both have extension functions (maybeShowColorPicker, maybeShowLocationSearch) that hook into onDisplayPreferenceDialog and onPreferenceTreeClick. ActivityResultLaunchers (pickImagesLauncher, pickLogoLauncher, pickAdzanAudioLauncher) are registered in SettingsFragment.onCreate. Copyright text at bottom of preferences.
directory_structure: app/src/main/java/id/muslimclock/app/ - all Kotlin sources (single package). app/src/main/res/xml/ - preference XML. app/src/main/res/layout/ - activity layouts. app/src/main/res/values/ - strings.xml, arrays.xml. app/src/main/res/drawable/ - vector drawables.
